subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, but the envelope had been opened. The opened envelopes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید ولی پوسته باز شده بود پاکتهای باز شده را آقا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity, @praise and encouragement, @unity in diversity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
